definition: 1 if any HH member has any Section 7 job row this year.
Number of HH members who worked (any job) this year.
Number of HH members aged 15–64 (working-age population denominator).
hh_n_workers / hh_n_working_age. NA if no working-age members.
Share of female 15–64 members who worked. NA if no female working-age members.
Count of workers aged 5–14 (child labour indicator).
Total number of jobs held across all HH members.
Number of jobs that are wage employment in agriculture.
Number of jobs that are wage employment not in agriculture.
Number of jobs that are self-employment in agriculture.
Number of jobs that are self-employment not in agriculture.
1 if any member has a non-agricultural wage job.
Total person-days of work across all members and jobs.
Total person-hours = Σ (days × hours-per-day). Approximate; assumes hours-per-day constant.
Mean days worked per worker = hh_total_days_worked_12m / hh_n_workers. NA if no workers.
1 if any HH member has a Section 8 wage job record.
Total Rs. from daily-wage jobs = s08q06 × days worked (Section 7).
Total Rs. from long-term jobs = 12·s08q12a + s08q12b + s08q12c + s08q12d + s08q12e.
Total Rs. from contract/piece-rate jobs.
Sum of daily + long-term + contract wage income.
1 if any HH member has a wage job in agriculture.
1 if any member in Fishing OR Mining sector.
1 if any member in Manufacturing.
1 if any member in Electricity/Gas/Water Supply.
1 if any member in Construction.
1 if any member in Wholesale/Retail Trade.
1 if any member in Hotels/Restaurants.
1 if any member in Transport/Storage/Communications.
1 if any member in Financial Intermediation OR Real Estate/Business.
1 if any member in Public Admin, Education, or Health/Social Work.
1 if any member in Other Community/Social/Personal Services.
1 if any member in primary sector (Agriculture, Fishing, Mining) — extraction from nature.
1 if any member in secondary sector (Manufacturing, Utilities, Construction) — transformation of materials.
1 if any member in tertiary sector (services: Trade, Hotels, Transport, Finance, Public, Community).
1 if any member in internationally-tradable sector: Manufacturing, Mining, Finance. Agriculture kept OUT since rural ag wage labour is hyper-local.
1 if any member in location-bound sector: Utilities, Construction, Trade, Hotels, Transport, Public, Community.
1 if any member worked outside Nepal this year. NA for 2016 (variable not in wave 1).
1 if any member reported a reason for returning from foreign work. NA for 2016.
